title: Slenderman: Revisited
description: Mod that brings Slender: The Arrival to Minecraft
body:
Slenderman Revisited is a mod that aims to revisit legendary game "Slender: The Arrival" one more time, this time in Minecraft!

To start a story mod - find Autumn Forest biome in your world, and once suitable spot would be found - The Prologue would begin.

Right now 2 chapters are available!!!
![Prologue beginning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ylxNQMjN/images/d93254052f170005ff556a8130c2094a12263ccc.png)
Prologue beginning
![Prologue House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ylxNQMjN/images/83b1fec4af6aa88ba209b8d4a84cb972b469dd55.png)
Prologue House
![Slenderman Encounter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ylxNQMjN/images/a043218dd37da1bcf1b8c6a0e8d31a3db4b38b1d.png)
Slenderman Encounter 
![Oakside Park Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ylxNQMjN/images/511d243f7326f96616dbdd564449637e970b51d3.png)
![Oakside Park Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ylxNQMjN/images/3f85a709d28f3c690f0855247548b074c2396755.png)
![Oakside Park Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ylxNQMjN/images/d22124a972a30e27979d2b5846a3db350c0af257.png)
Oakside Park Structures

NOTE: Set GUI Scaling to Auto, for correct work.

Multiplayer - Fully Supported!

Souce Code - will be available when the mod is finished.

Authors: Me - Code and Models, Polar_Mimmozir - Structures and Map(Comming Soon), Sadwe - Texture Work, also Check out her drawings: https://x.com/sadwe_96. <3
